# aer_simulartor_unitary

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
import numpy as np

circ = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
circ.ry(np.pi/4, 0)
unitary_circ = circ.copy()  # 复制原始电路
unitary_circ.save_unitary() 
```

```{python}
from qiskit_aer import Aer
# use backend to calcualte and statistics 
unitary_backend = Aer.get_backend('aer_simulator_unitary')
job = unitary_backend.run(unitary_circ)
unitary_result = job.result()
unitary_matrix = unitary_result.get_unitary()  # get the statevector in matrix form 
print(unitary_matrix)
```
